Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class SecuritySettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SecuritySettings2
public class SecuritySettings2 extends SObject

Java class for SecuritySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SecuritySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CanUsersGrantLoginAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAdminLoginAsAnyUserEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAuditFieldsInactiveOwnerEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAuraSecureEvalPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCoepHeaderEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCoopHeaderEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRequireHttpsConnectionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SecuritySettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NetworkAccess" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}NetworkAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NetworkAccessId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PasswordPolicies" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}PasswordPolicies" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PasswordPoliciesId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RedirectBlockModeEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionSettings" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SessionSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionSettingsId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SingleSignOnSettings" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SingleSignOnSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SingleSignOnSettingsId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
